utterances.speaker: Hold Voice
utterances.text: Thank you for your patience , you are the next caller .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yes ! ! Yes ! ! I am the next caller ! You were gonna have me hang up .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Hey ! Can you take a duck and a chick to the theatre ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_Can you take a duck and a chick to the theatre ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Okay . I just wanted them to hear it from somebody else .
